No Poverty.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description or objectives links to eradicating poverty.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description or objectives links to ending hunger or improving nutrition.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The reading 'Three Days to See' by Helen Keller, focusing on perception and appreciation, offers a very tenuous, inferred link to mental well-being (Target 3.4).

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it directly provides tertiary education (4.3) and develops advanced literacy and communication skills (4.6, 4.4) for effective learning and future employment.

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description or objectives links to promoting gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description or objectives links to water and sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description or objectives links to energy access or renewables.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course develops advanced writing and communication skills, which are highly relevant for securing productive employment and decent work (Target 8.5).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description or objectives links to industry, innovation, or infrastructure.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The writing prompt on 'the school uniform question' tangentially touches on topics of social and economic equality, related to Target 10.3.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: Core competence A, 'To trace the historical and cultural transformations in Western literature,' fosters appreciation for cultural heritage (Target 11.4).

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description or objectives links to sustainable consumption or production.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description or objectives links to climate change or action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description or objectives links to marine life or oceans.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course description or objectives links to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Explicit instruction on 'how to avoid plagiarism' and 'Respect Copyright' directly supports upholding the rule of law and intellectual property rights (Target 16.3).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The use of 'peer reviews' fosters collaborative learning and knowledge sharing, aligning with the spirit of multi-stakeholder partnerships (Target 17.17) on a micro-level.
